---
id: retrieves-hexagon-grid-data-for-the-map
title: "Retrieves hexagon grid data for the map"
description: "Returns hexagonal grid data for map visualization. Supports both authenticated access and public sharing via UUID."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieves hexagon grid data for the map"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/maps/hexagons"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns hexagonal grid data for map visualization. Supports both authenticated access and public sharing via UUID.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
